record.title: Kaiju No. 8
record.description:
Grotesque, Godzilla-like monsters called "kaijuu" have been appearing around Japan for many years. To combat these beasts, an elite military unit known as the Defense Corps risks their lives daily to protect civilians. Once a creature is killed, "sweepers"—working under the Professional Kaijuu Cleaner Corporation—are left to dispose of its remains.

Kafka Hibino is a 32-year-old member of the Professional Kaiju Cleanup Corp. Kafka was also childhood friends with Mina Ashiro who he made a vow with to join the Defense Force together and protect Japan from Kaiju. However, Kafka failed the entrance exam numerous times and quit on his dreams of being a member of the Defense Force while Mina went on to become the captain of the Defense Force’s 3rd Division.

Following a chain of unfortunate events and an interaction with an ambitious recruit named Leno Ichikawa, Kafka encounters a parasite-type kaijuu that forces its way in through his mouth—turning him into a humanoid monster. With his newfound powers, Kafka aims to give his lifelong dream a final try.

Original Manga
Read for FREE on MANGA Plus!
Read for FREE on VIZ!

Offiicial Arabic
مانجا العربية[manga arabia]

Note: Was nominated for the 14th Manga Taishou Award in 2021 and the 26th Tezuka Osamu Cultural Prize in 2022.

record.title: Kaiju No. 8: B-Side
record.description: Front-line stories of the Defense Force not covered in the main series! Based on the light novel side story.

record.title: Kaijuu 8-gou dj - Koko de Shicha Dame.
record.description: Pairing: Ichikawa Leno x Hibino Kafka

record.title: Koibito 8-gou
record.description: A woman is attacked by a masked man, and a female magazine reporter, just one year into her job, goes all out to uncover the man's identity in this "erotic and suspenseful story."

record.title: Typhoon No.8
record.description:
The story of an arrogant company director who takes over the care of his late brother's blind ward.

Original Manhua
Official English

With Huo Jiuan’s last and final words to Huo Changzhi, “Please, promise me! Y-you’ll… look after him…” His brother Huo Changzhi swore to look after his (possibly lover?) Xu Chu, who suffers from blindness.

In Tokyo in the 90s, the city center has been suffering from a continuing depopulation. Also affected is Udagawa Junior High School where only six people are left. Their class leader, protector, and very good friend Masato died in an illegal skateboarding race.

Five months later, Eito Hachiya, nicknamed Eight or 8, enrolls in school and wants to find out what happened. He even just looks like Masato! But mysteries surround him: Why does he know all the other six? Why can’t they remember him?

This manga was canceled after about 25% of volume 4 was completed. The epilogue consists of an alternative ending for it.

record.title: Kaiju no Nuigurumi
record.description: "Kaiju no Nuigurumi" is a comedy about Kotori Okai, an Arasa woman who is looking for a job, because the udon shop she was working for has collapsed. One day, Kotori's father suggests that she should go to his uncle, who lives alone near the lake, for a change. I used to think that my uncle was a little strange from an early age, but the uncle I met again after a long time has changed somehow ...

record.title: Otome Monster Caramelize
record.description:
Afflicted by a "mysterious illness," high school first year Kuroe has spent her entire life avoiding socializing with others. However, after coming into contact with Minami Arata, the most popular boy in school, something changes--and Kuroe's true powers are unleashed...

Original WebComic

record.title: Trigram 8
record.description: Yatsufusa Yoh's father reappears after a year and suddenly enrolls him into a school out of the blue. Offered the chance to meet with an old friend, he sets out only to run across two Nemesis Power Users and the battle against Karma begins...

record.title: Kaiju Beidong Wudi
record.description:
Original Webcomic:
AC.QQ, BiliBili Manhua, KuaiKan Manhua, IQIYI

Official Translations:
Japanese, Korean

What if the monster is too strong to defeat?

Don’t worry, passively resisting fire ring, automatically bounce the monster, you can never hurt me!

What should I do if I get ridiculed and defamed?

Don’t worry, the passive Zaun quotes are dirty, and there are many people who have been scolded by me.

What if your teammates are too weak to win?

Don’t worry, passively strengthening halo, and teammates will always stay under my crotch for output.

The stable boy Meng Fan, accidentally traversed to the monster world and opened the passive system!

record.title: Kaijuu Jieitai: Task Force for Paranormal Disaster Management
record.description:
A classic Kaijū manga by the author of Otogi Matsuri and BTOOOM!

Follow JSDF officers Yamato Yoshikazu and Sakimori Konoe as they face off against monsters of unknown origin that infest the troubled, disputed waters of the East Asian sea and have humans as a preferential prey!

record.title: 8 mm
record.description: When Sun-Hyuk Cho became an orphan at a young age he was taken in by his maternal grandfather, an extremly wealthy and notorius businessman. However his grandfather has just died leaving teenage Sun-Hyuk Cho his fortune under the condition he finish his education. In Sun-Hyuk Cho's video journal he reveals the difficulties he's having dealing with this death. He is not helped by the eccentric employees his grandfather has left behind or by his own eccentricities.

record.title: Off to an Invincible Start
record.description:
"Ding! The host has activated the Field of Invincibility! You will be unbeatable as long as you remain within the field!" A shut-in by the name of Chen Chang'an was transported into a fantasy world, and he swore not to leave the Field of Invincibility until he became an immortal after being endlessly pursued by countless demons and monsters. In the meantime, while he was bored, he took in a few cute and adorable disciples. He accidentally turned them into big shots of the cultivation world and turned it upside down.

Original Webcomic:
AC.QQ, BiliBili, KuaiKan, IQIYI, Mkzhan, Zymk

Official Translations:
Japanese

record.title: Dust 8
record.description: A plane crashes and 8 people survive – and they shouldn’t have save for the fact that the mountain has an unusual magical property and the survivors were all hit with rocks from the mountain during the crash. As long as they keep those rocks, they stay alive. But the guardian of the mountain sends two people after the survivors to get the rocks back, in the disguise of two children killed in the crash.

record.title: Rockman 8
record.description: Two forces emerge from the darkness and pierce the surface of the Earth. Good or evil, it was he (Wily) who took one of them in his hands. Meanwhile, Forte chases after Rock. Everything is guided by fate, and Rock takes a stand against Wily's new ambition!

record.title: 8 Man
record.description: The Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department's Investigation Division has 49 members, with 7 squads of 7 members. 8 Man, however, is part of an 8th squad, with no other members. In reality, 8 Man is a robot who assumes the identity of Azuma, a detective who works with the Metropolitan Police. 8 Man has abilities such as super speed, and the ability to shift his appearance. Only a select few know this secret - not even Ichiro or Sachiko, the two younger companions of Azuma, know this fact. 8 Man deals with all sorts of scoundrels and criminals from all over the world - both as the detective Azuma, and the robot 8 Man!

record.title: Kaijuu Iro no Shima
record.description: Without a single friend, middle schooler Chigawa Kon lives on a small island and laments that she hasn't "fallen in love" yet, unlike her classmates. She often plays by "the Hole", a cave near the sea where a man-eating monster lives, according to folk tales. One day, as she meets with another girl who accidentally drops her smartphone in the sea, they fall from a cliff together but miraculously survive. It turns out Furuka is also all alone.
